title: Coverage: search/lookup are UK+US only; EU is vat-validation only; flow card over-claims DE/FR/NL/ES/IL
summary: The live spiderCompanyData worker is narrower than the flow card. search queries UK Companies House + US SEC EDGAR (country=GB->UK, US->US, omitted->both, other->empty). lookup resolves GB or US only — any other country returns success:false 'Unsupported country: XX'. The EU is reachable ONLY via vat (VIES validation, 28 member states), which validates a number + sometimes returns the entity name, not a filing. There is NO DE/FR/NL/ES/IL company-record lookup despite the flow card and the normalizer's _VALID_SOURCES (forward-compat tags, no adapter emits them). US coverage is SEC-filing (public) companies; US records are thin (name+CIK+hardcoded active). UK financials are lookup-only, ~$0.05 via OCR; the live worker has only url_only(free) and auto/ocr(paid) — ixbrl/regex are coerced to auto. Small/micro UK filings omit revenue/P&L.
references: windmill-scripts/spidercompanydata_lookup.py:418-426 — lookup GB/US only; else success:false 'Unsupported country'
windmill-scripts/spidercompanydata_lookup.py:437 — financials_mode coerced: only url_only/ocr/auto honored, else auto
windmill-scripts/spidercompanydata_vat.py:37-41 — VIES EU_COUNTRY_CODES (28; EL not GR; XI; no GB)
app/jobs/crm_sync_worker.py:1154-1155 — normalizer _VALID_SOURCES lists DE/FR/NL/ES/IL (forward-compat, no worker adapter)
